source_free_generated_output_contract.claim_boundary: Only scoped local user-row, literal-table, calendar/date-dimension, range, sequence, SQL VALUES, SQL literal SELECT, SQL generate_series/range, scoped range projections, scoped generated with_column, local-emulator object-store generated-output, and local Foundry-style generated-output proof routes are admitted; live object-store providers, real Foundry APIs, broad SQL/DataFrame, lakehouse/table, production, package, and performance claims remain blocked or report-only.

rows.claim_boundary: No-dataset smoke is a status/capability proof only, not generated-output execution.
Only scoped local user-row JSONL/CSV generated-output fixture smoke is admitted.
Only scoped local range JSONL/CSV generated-output fixture smoke is admitted.
Only scoped local sequence JSONL/CSV generated-output fixture smoke is admitted.
Only scoped local literal-table JSONL/CSV generated-output fixture smoke is admitted.
Only scoped local calendar/date-dimension JSONL/CSV generated-output fixture smoke is admitted.
Generated-source write is admitted only for supported local user_rows, literal_table, calendar, range, sequence, SQL VALUES, SQL literal SELECT, and SQL generate_series/range JSONL/CSV smokes.
Generated output support is local JSONL/CSV fixture-smoke only; object-store, lakehouse, and Foundry sinks remain blocked/report-only.
Only source-free SQL literal SELECT local JSONL/CSV fixture smokes are admitted; no broad SQL runtime or production claim.
Only source-free SQL VALUES local JSONL/CSV fixture smokes are admitted; no broad SQL runtime or production claim.

SQL source-free projection is admitted only for scoped range-generator value-column/int64 expression projections to local JSONL/CSV and feature-gated flat scalar Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro/ORC sinks; arbitrary SQL source-free projection remains blocked.

SQL generate_series/range is admitted only for SELECT * plus scoped value-column/int64-arithmetic projections from generate_series/range(...) local JSONL/CSV generated-output fixture smokes; no broad SQL runtime claim.
Scoped DataFrame literal projection rows to local JSONL/CSV generated-output fixture smoke only; broad expression-backed DataFrame generation remains blocked.

Generated DataFrame with_column is admitted only for scoped generated-row literal columns and generated range int64 expression columns before local JSONL/CSV and feature-gated flat scalar Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro/ORC output; broad expression-backed generation remains blocked.

Object-store generated output is admitted only for scoped local-emulator flat or partitioned fixture paths with staged local generated rows and optional partition-discovery proof; live S3/GCS/ADLS, credential resolution, provider probes, table/lakehouse commits, production, and performance claims remain blocked.

rows.user_visible_surface: Generated output to live S3/GCS/ADLS object-store URI
rows.claim_boundary: Live object-store generated-output writes are blocked; a local-emulator fixture proof does not authorize provider credentials, provider probes, network writes, or production object-store claims.

Foundry-style generated output is admitted only as local dataset/evidence-directory proof; real Foundry runtime, output APIs, package publication, Marketplace, Spark, object-store, and production claims remain blocked.

rows.user_visible_surface: Generated output to real Foundry dataset/API
rows.claim_boundary: Real Foundry generated-output runtime is blocked until an explicit platform integration writes output and evidence datasets without Spark or external-engine fallback.

object_store_admission_ladder.claim_boundary: S3/GCS/ADLS admission ladder plus public no-credential fixture read smoke. The admitted fixture profile parses provider URIs and reads explicit local fixture bytes only; no credential resolution, network probe, provider probe, live provider read, object-store write, cache write, commit, table/lakehouse, production, performance, or Spark-replacement claim.

rows.claim_boundary: Object-store URI recognition is report-only and does not perform provider, credential, network, read, write, or commit effects.
Credential resolution remains blocked; no secrets are read and no provider credentials are resolved.
Public no-credential fixture reads parse S3/GCS/ADLS URIs and read caller-supplied local fixture bytes only. Live provider network reads remain blocked.
Authenticated object-store reads remain blocked; public and credentialed read admission are separate gates.
Byte-range reads remain blocked despite planning evidence; no object-store request is issued.
Full-file object-store reads remain blocked and distinct from byte-range reads.
Local cache is planned as a future safety layer; it is not a runtime cache or support claim.
Object-store write staging remains blocked and separate from read support.
Object-store commit remains blocked and does not imply table/lakehouse commit support.

table_format_boundary_matrix.claim_boundary: Iceberg/Delta/Hudi table-format boundary matrix visibility only; local metadata smoke is related evidence, not table-format runtime, table scan, table write, commit, rollback, catalog, object-store, production, performance, or Spark-replacement support.

rows.claim_boundary: Local manifest metadata smoke is related evidence only; Iceberg, Delta, and Hudi metadata runtime is not supported.
Table-format scan/data read remains blocked and is separate from local metadata smoke.
Snapshot and time-travel semantics are not runtime-supported.
Partition-evolution compatibility remains planning/report evidence only.
Local delete/tombstone fixture smoke is related evidence only; table-format delete runtime is blocked.
Table append remains blocked and does not follow from output-file writer support.
Merge/update/delete table operations remain blocked.
Table commit remains blocked and separate from metadata planning, output files, and object-store commit posture.
Rollback and recovery semantics remain blocked.
External catalog interaction remains blocked; local catalog refs are not catalog runtime.
Object-store-backed table runtime remains blocked until object-store read/write/commit gates are independently admitted.

database_warehouse_boundary_matrix.claim_boundary: Local SQLite file import/export fixture smoke is admitted through sqlite-local-import-export-smoke only; network database and warehouse connectors, credential resolution, network probes, driver loading, query pushdown, fallback engines, production, performance, and Spark-replacement support remain blocked.

rows.claim_boundary: SQLite import/export is smoke-supported only through sqlite-local-import-export-smoke: a named local table scan to workspace-safe JSONL plus roundtrip SQLite replay. Arbitrary SQL, query pushdown, credentials, network databases, warehouses, and production connectors remain blocked.
Postgres remains blocked as a connector endpoint; it is not a fallback engine or query-pushdown runtime.
MySQL remains blocked as a connector endpoint; it is not a fallback engine or query-pushdown runtime.
JDBC/ODBC bridge loading remains blocked; drivers are not loaded and bridge availability is not claimed.
Snowflake remains a future import/export endpoint or external baseline only; no warehouse runtime or pushdown claim.
BigQuery remains a future import/export endpoint or external baseline only; no warehouse runtime or pushdown claim.
Databricks SQL remains a future import/export endpoint or external baseline only; no warehouse runtime or Spark fallback claim.

prepared_vortex_input_contract: prepared_vortex executes from VortexPreparedState; non-Vortex sources must first pass UniversalIngress/InputAdapter -> SourceState -> vortex_ingest.
